title: Majestic Lion Coloring Page
seoTitle: Free Majestic Lion Coloring Page (Printable PDF)
seoDescription: Download and print this stunning majestic lion head coloring page. Ideal for kids, safari themes, and animal lovers. Free high-res PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Lions are the only big cats that live in family groups called prides, where female lionesses do most of the hunting.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing smooth gradient shading using wax crayons or markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about geometric symmetry and relaxing design while developing fine motor coordination.
